package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_depends_on_transport_request_type: Service signatures that accept request DTOs declared in handler or transport packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule165NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule165NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule165NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario165Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule165NegativeService, input Rule165NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
